title: Which year and version are these please
display_title: Which year and version are these please
wikitext:
[]: Which year & version are these please             Quote Post by Neon Genesis » Thu Sep 19, 2024 3:08 pm Hello everyone! Please help me identify this version, year, special features info, release info, what discs it includes, and any extra bunch of info. I’m having a very hard time researching it, & potentially want to buy it from a seller. The seller doesn’t know much more about details. Thank you very much in advance for the help.

[]: Re: Which year & version are these please             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Thu Sep 19, 2024 6:28 pm That's an unofficial fan release, it doesn't have interface menus, and I can't vouch for the quality.

[]: Re: Which year & version are these please             Quote Post by Neon Genesis » Thu Sep 19, 2024 10:48 pm Axx°N N. wrote: That's an unofficial fan release, it doesn't have interface menus, and I can't vouch for the quality.

[]: Re: Which year & version are these please             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Fri Sep 20, 2024 12:19 pm Neon Genesis wrote: Very interestingly, the seller sent me pictures of the Blu-ray menus, interface menu, setup screenshots, ending credits scene.

[]: Re: Which year & version are these please             Quote Post by Neon Genesis » Sat Sep 21, 2024 12:11 am Axx°N N. wrote: Neon Genesis#943783 wrote: Very interestingly, the seller sent me pictures of the Blu-ray menus, interface menu, setup screenshots, ending credits scene.

[]: Re: Which year & version are these please             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Sat Sep 21, 2024 12:56 am No problem! Neon Genesis wrote: So the audio will not be exactly from the bluray as it may be ripped from bluray audio, but it may possibly be better than dvd audio.

[]: Re: Which year & version are these please             Quote Post by LucasMount » Mon Sep 23, 2024 3:44 pm I also want to know.
